aweme_list.desc: Financial services firms are expecting a rapid increase in job losses over the coming months as investment plans and optimism levels sink to fresh lows. The sector’s activity fell at the fastest rate since December 2023 in the three months to June, according to the Confederation of British Industry (CBI). This marked the first time activity in the sector had decreased in more than a year. A sharp drop in output at banks led to the downturns as businesses anticipated slower activity for the coming months. 🔗 Click the article link below to get more of the story 👇 #unitedkingdom #news #economy #economics #business #finance #financialservices #banking #investing #jobs #graduate #graduatejobs #work #jobcuts #layoffs #worktrends #bigfour #deloitte #kpmg #ernstandyoung #ey #pwc

aweme_list.desc: It’s been a busy February so far, assisting brokers with a range of refurbishment, residential and auction bridging loans. 👏 So, what do the deals look like? 🔎 We helped a first-time landlord purchase a residential investment property in West Drayton, so that they could fund the refurbishment themselves. 🏚️ An existing borrower purchased a Grade II listed hotel in a spa town in Yorkshire, adding this to their expanding portfolio. They will complete minor works and reopen to the public. 🏨 We helped a borrower purchase a property in Peckham that comprises eight units across two adjoining freehold titles. There are four x 1-bedroom flats and four x 2-bedroom flats, close to Bermondsey station. 🏠 We can fund loans from £50k up to £7.5m by referral, designed to give your clients more power and control. 🌟 Take a look at our recent completions...👇 #brokers #bridginglender #financialservices #bridgingloans #completions

author.signature: Saddle up TikTok! BTS at LBG

aweme_list.desc: A big thank you to everyone who joined Mike and Rick Davey in Salford today for the Specialist Lending Event... 🤝  We enjoyed meeting brokers, discussing how our truly transparent lending solutions are helping to reshape the market, and also listening to what's impacting business at the moment. 🧳  There seems to be a lot of concern from brokers about valuations and how best to prepare in the case of any discrepancies - we suggest working closely and transparently with clients at all times, helping them understand where and when any discrepancies might arise. It's not just about the first and only transaction; it's about taking a long term view to support your client over many cycles and how you can add value in each scenario. 👍  Mike & Rick will be at tomorrow's Specialist Lending Event in Wetherby... see you there! 🚗  #SLE2026 #bridgingfinance #financialservices
